items.title: Follow up with Sai at Discern Security on catch-up call request
items.context: Email from fan@fin.capital to sai@discernsecurity.com on May 18: 'If you are open to a quick catch-up call, I would love to learn more about the latest developments and discuss how we might be able to support you.'

items.title: Align on key messages about Opti for Donna ahead of SMBC AD management meeting May 27
items.context: Email from ryo.ishii@smbcgroup.com on May 16: 'I'd love to circle back as we prepare for the upcoming AD management meeting, especially to align on the key messages for Donna.' Rina shared Opti differentiation notes with SMBC team.

items.title: Review Prism Layer seed round pitch deck before May 26 in-person meeting
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 15: 'Hi everyone--just finished our seed round pitch deck. Talk soon!' Pitch deck v4 attached. In-person meeting scheduled May 26 at Fin Capital offices.

items.title: Prepare for SMBC AD management meeting on May 27
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund' on May 27 with 24 attendees from SMBC, JRI, Atlas Beyond, and Fin Capital. Ryo requested alignment on key messages for Donna re: iVerify, VanishID, and Opti pipeline.

items.title: Upload YC batch data
items.context: Calendar reminder 'Upload YC' on May 27 at 9:15am PT — recurring task to upload latest YC batch information.
